meaning: n.庙,寺,神殿,教堂,礼拜堂,太阳穴,鬓角
examples: We go to temple on Saturdays.
The chanting inside the temple stopped.
The temple is now inaccessible to the public.
The path from the shrine wound up a steep hill to Kodaji Temple.
For a taste of more ancient beliefs, any itinerary should include a marae, or Polynesian temple.
